name: Polish Reuben Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 cans (10 3/4 oz each) condensed cream of mushroom soup
2 cans (16 oz each) sauerkraut, rinsed and drained
1 1/2 lb Polish sausage, fully cooked, cut into 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a medium bowl, combine soup, milk, onion, and mustard; blend well.
3. Spread sauerkraut evenly in a greased 13 x 9 inch pan.
4. Top with uncooked noodles.
5. Spoon the soup mixture evenly over the noodles.
6. Cover with sausage slices, then sprinkle cheese on top.
7. In a small bowl, combine bread crumbs and butter; mix until crumbly.
8. Sprinkle the breadcrumb mixture evenly over the casserole.
9. Cover pan tightly with foil.
10. Bake for 1 hour or until noodles are tender. Garnish as desired before serving.
